data.title: Minimalistic Communication
data.description: Emphasis on clear and straightforward messaging capabilities.

data.title: Global Connectivity
data.description: WhatsApp aims to connect users around the world seamlessly.

data.description: Focused on delivering messages with speed and reliability.
data.technical_spec: Optimized server routing and message compression.

data.title: Security and Privacy
data.description: Prioritizes user privacy and data protection.
data.technical_spec: End-to-end encryption and user privacy settings.

data.title: User-Centric Experience
